channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Manga Kakeru to be delisted on March 31
item.content:encoded:
• PS Vita
  • PS4

Manga creation software from Granzella.

Granzella will delist manga creation software Manga Kakeru from PlayStation Store on March 31 at 17:00 JST, the company announced. Manga Yomeru, a website where works created in Manga Kakeru can be shared and viewed, will also shut down on the same day.

Manga Kakeru first launched for PlayStation Vita on January 26, 2018 in Japan, followed by PlayStation 4 on June 19, 2018.

According to Granzella, the delisting and website closure are due to factors including the transition between console generations and a change in industry by the company contracted to operate Manga Yomeru, which has made it difficult to continue services and release previously planned material additions such as fantasy-themed assets.

Since launch, more than 8,000 works have been submitted to Manga Yomeru—from humorous and memorable works, to those that utilize the software’s tools beyond the developer’s imagination.

Granzella also revealed that it had been planning and prototyping a sequel tentatively titled Manga Kakeru 2. However, citing major changes in the image creation process in recent years, the company determined it could no longer expand the role or value the original Manga Kakeru was able to provide.

While the game will be delisted, users who already Manga Kakeru will still be able to download and utilize the software to create new works. Users who want to purchase the game before it is delisted can do so via PlayStation Store for 815 yen. One purchase includes both the PlayStation 4 and PS Vita versions.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/manga-kakeru-to-be-delisted-on-march-31
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Suikoden: The Anime airs in October, first trailer
item.content:encoded:
• Anime

The anime adaptation of Suikoden II.

Suikoden: The Anime, the March 2025-announced anime adaptation of Suikoden II, will begin airing in October, Konami announced. The first trailer was also released.

Here is an introduction to the anime, via its official website:

Introduction

I thought if I was that strong, I could protect everyone.

Two young boys… the hero, Riliu, and his best friend Jowy, were members of a youth brigade of their home nation, the Highland Kingdom – a powerful military nation located in the north-east of the Dunan region.

The two of them looked up at the same starry skies, slept in the same tent, and believed in the same future. Once the fighting was over, and the night ended, their daily lives were sure to return.

Contrary to their hopes, the two boys become swept up in the whirlpool of fate, guided by the flames of war.

The powerless boys reached for, and grasped immense power. As the 108 stars shine brightly in the murky horizon, the boys step forward, each with their own beliefs for an answer-less question.

Staff

  • Original Work: Konami Digital Entertainment
  • Chief Director: YUZO
  • Series Composition: Michihiro Tsuchiya
  • Game Character Design: Fumi Ishikawa (Konami Digital Entertainment)
  • Anime Character Design Basis: Arata Suzuki (Konami Digital Entertainment)
  • Anime Character Design: Ryo Yamauchi
  • Sound Director: Yoshikazu Iwanami
  • Music: Koji Nakamura
  • Planning: NBCUniversal Entertainment Japan
  • Production and Produce: Konami animation
  • Production Committee: Suikoden: The Anime Project

Cast

  • Riliu (voiced by Toshiki Kumagai) – Raised in Kyaro, a town in Highland Kingdom, and a member of the Unicorn Youth Brigade. Riliu was adopted by Genkaku when he was still young, and grew up alongside Nanami and Jowy. He has a gentle nature, and deeply cares for his friends.
  • Jowy (voiced by Shimba Tsuchiya) – Riliu’s longtime friend and a member of the Unicorn Youth Brigade. He is a part of the Atreides family, a noble family in Kyaro, but the family name has burdened him from childhood. Behind his gentle and intelligent personality, he hides his strong belief and resolve.
  • Nanami (voiced by Ayumi Hinohara) – Adopted and raised by Genkaku like Riliu and is his stepsister. Always donning a smile on her face, she is always upbeat and energetic, however, can be a little too over-bearing at times. She is in charge of the house while Riliu is fighting in the brigade.
  • Viktor (voiced by Katsuyuki Konishi) – A cheerful and daring mercenary of the Jowston City-States, known as “Vagabond Viktor.” Having many battles behind him, his skills are high. He swings around his giant sword with ease on the battlefield, but off of it, he also has a sharp eye for people, and has a friendliness that allows him to easily blend in.
  • Flik (voiced by Yuichi Nakamura) – A swordsman with a memorable blue cloak and keen eyes, known as “Flik of the Blue Lightning.” Longtime partners with Viktor, he takes pride in what he does and has a logical mindset. From time to time, he may say some harsh things, but they’re all backed up with a strong sense of responsibility and his deep caring for his friends.
  • Luca Blight (voiced by Taku Yashiro) – Prince of the Highland Kingdom and Commander of the First Corps of Highland Army. He reigns over others through fear and force, leaving a trail of blood and despair in his wake, making him known as the “Mad Prince.”
  • Jillia Blight (voiced by Chika Anzai) – Princess of the Highland Kingdom, she has a completely opposite type of personality compared to her older brother, Luca, and is torn by the sacrifices and cruelty that war brings. She may appear reserved and docile, but she has a strong backbone and tries to stop her brother’s cruel ways.
  • Rowd (voiced by Akihiro Mine) – Soldier of the Highland Army and captain of the Unicorn Youth Brigade that Riliu and Jowy belong to. He is a man who has high ambitions and a love for money, and so is quite unsatisfied with his current position.
  • Pilika (voiced by Tsukino Chikasada) – A cheerful, pure, and good-hearted young girl that lives in Toto Village, a territory within Muse borders. She meets Jowy through a chance encounter and grows to love him like family.
  • Luc (voiced by Ayumu Murase) – An apprentice of Leknaat, overseer of fate. Highly skilled in magic and equally sharp with his tongue.
  • Shu (voiced by Takeo Otsuka) – A strategist with a critical eye to broadly assess any battle scene at hand, and a deeply logical mind that enables him to make swift decisions. He is brilliant and was the most senior student of genius strategist Mathiu Silverberg, but was expelled, and currently lives in Radat, living as a trader.
  • Apple (voiced by Yoshino Aoyama) – A young strategist, student of genius strategist Mathiu, and Shu’s sister-student. She stands up to stop Luca’s rampant cruelty, which seeks to destroy all in its path.
  • Mukumuku (voiced by Masato Niwa) – A flying squirrel born in Greenhill Forest and an old friend of Riliu. When Riliu is out serving in the army, he spends his time with Nanami.

Watch the trailer below.

Trailer #1



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/suikoden-the-anime-airs-in-october-first-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: BLOKES on BLOCKS! now available for Switch, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Fast-paced action party game from Crafts & Meister.

Fast-paced action party game BLOKES on BLOCKS! is now available for Switch and PC via Steam at a launch discount price of $8.69, developer Crafts & Meister announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Crafts & Meister:

About

BLOKES on BLOCKS! is a fast-paced action party game for up to six players that anyone can jump into with simple controls!

Choose your favorite bloke and send the other blokes flying!

Key Features

  • Simple Controls – Movement is all you need—up, down, left, and right. Crash into other players to knock them down, then crash into them again to send them flying. It’s a simple, straight-up competitive game built entirely around movement and collisions.
  • Chaotic Multiplayer Fun – Pick up items to crank up the chaos in battle—press the A button to use them! Bombs, missiles, beams and more turn every match into total mayhem. Fast, chaotic matches make it easy to jump in anytime, even if you only have a few minutes to play.

Game Modes

  • Last Stand – Survive to the very end! A life-based battle mode where you respawn quickly, even after being knocked out.
    Even after losing all your lives, you can still attack from outside and interfere with the battle—a loud, chaotic mode that stays exciting until the very last moment.
  • Chip Rush – Collect chips and claim victory! Gather chips scattered across the stage or steal them from other players to compete for the win. Near the end of the match, the Piggy Bank appears, opening up a huge chance for a last-second comeback!
  • Sudden Smash – Get knocked down, and it’s instant KO!? A high-risk, round-based battle where every smash is a one-hit finisher. Send your opponents flying, rack up points and aim for first place!

Watch the launch trailer below.

Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/blokes-on-blocks-now-available-for-switch-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hotel Barcelona ‘Under New Management’ update now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Major systems overhaul, five free collaboration skins, and more.

Publisher Dark Product and developer White Owls have released the “Under New Management” update for side-scrolling action game Hotel Barcelona, described as a “structural refinement of the player experience” that features a major systems overhaul, five free collaboration skins, and other improvements.

Here are the patch notes:

  • Combat, Flow, and Player Control
    • Faster recovery from attacks with expanded cancel timing into jump, dodge, guard, and follow-up attacks.
    • Reduced stamina friction and shortened attack animations for a more aggressive combat rhythm.
    • Increased base dodge distance and rebalanced dodge skills.
    • Fully reworked parry system. Precise guard timing now triggers parries and rewards HP Recovery Orbs.
    • Guard now consumes stamina, creating meaningful defensive decisions.
    • Multiple new parry skills added to the skill tree. Skill layout and progression reworked.
    • New skill “Enhancement Luck+” added.
    • Weapon balance adjustments including Flamethrower AP tuning­.
  • Enemy and Stage Rebalancing­
    • Enemy HP, attack ranges, and reaction timing adjusted across multiple types.
    • Phantom Lost removed from Normal difficulty and below.
    • Boss durability and behavior adjustments for Jacob, Nigel, and Eve.
    • Terrain, camera distance, and door placement improvements in key stages.
  • Invasion Multiplayer Improvements
    • Reduced imbalance caused by player progression differences.
    • Improved parry reactions between players.
    • Doppelgangers can no longer invade during boss fights.
    • Doppelgangers no longer interfere with enemies or environmental systems.
    • Matchmaking and multiplayer user interface improvements.
  • Quality of Life and Performance
    • Optimized performance across the entire game.
    • DualShock controller support added.
    • Prologue tutorial, layout, and user interface improvements.
    • Dialogue autoplay added.
    • Extensive UI, localization, boss fight, journal, animation, and achievement fixes.
  • Five New Playable Skins, Free for All Players
    • Demonschool Faye – A cult indie crossover presence inside the nightmare hotel.
    • Slitterhead Alex – A horror infused guest skin with a sharp silhouette in combat.
    • Slitterhead Julee – A second Slitterhead crossover that stands out immediately in motion.
    • Promise Mascot Agency Pinky – A surreal mascot dropped into violent horror for striking contrast.
    • Promise Mascot Agency Michi – A companion mascot skin that heightens the absurdity of the setting .

Hotel Barcelona is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store.

Watch the update trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

“Under New Management” Update Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/hotel-barcelona-under-new-management-update-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S coming to PS5, PS4 on March 18
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • PS5

The predecessor to Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S+.

Publisher KOMODO and developer Crypton Future Media will release Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S for PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 4 on March 18 for $13.99 / 1,540 yen, the companies announced. Wishlisting is now available via PlayStation Store.

Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S first launched for Switch on March 18, 2021, followed by Xbox Series, Xbox One, and PC via Microsoft Store on January 19, 2022, and PC via Steam on November 20, 2022.

A follow-up game, Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S+, was released for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 24, 2025.

Here is a brief overview of Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S, via KOMODO:

Featuring Hatsune Miku and Piapro Characters, Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S is a puzzle game that serves as the predecessor to the latest title, Hatsune Miku Logic Paint S+.

Enjoy logic puzzles that reveal colorful illustrations as they progress. Its easy-to-learn gameplay and joyful atmosphere make it perfect for both puzzle fans and Miku enthusiasts alike.

Originally released on Steam, Xbox, and Switch, the game has been loved by players around the world and now arrives on PlayStation.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/hatsune-miku-logic-paint-s-coming-to-ps5-ps4-on-march-18
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Bunny Garden 2 debut trailer, details, and screenshots
item.content:encoded:
qureate has launched official website for Bunny Garden 2, its recently announced dating simulation adventure game sequel coming to Switch and PC via Steam this spring for $24.99.

Here are the first details:

About

Another unforgettable night is about to begin…

Bunny Garden‘s brand-new title finally arrives!

This latest installment in the romance adventure game series is designed for gentlemen of pure heart who frequent the gentlemen’s retreat “Bunny Garden” and connect with its uniquely charming cast.

Reunite with familiar faces while welcoming new additions, delivering an even more immersive experience than its predecessor.

The “gentleman’s games” have evolved further; how you enjoy them is entirely up to you.

Forget the hardships of daily life and indulge in sweet, heart-pounding nights.

Story

Haito Kanda (name changeable) lost his job due to a major mistake at work, and had fallen into despair over everything.

Just as he was heading to his usual cheap pub to drown his sorrows…

A woman suddenly spoke to him, noticing his dejected expression.

That was the fateful encounter…

Guided by her, he stepped into a sanctuary for gentlemen, where women as adorable as rabbits welcomed him…

“Bunny Garden.”

What changes will this encounter bring to their lives, and yours?

It’s all up to you…

A new Bunny Garden, set in a different world line from the previous title.

A brand-new story and a cast you have yet to meet await you.

  • ❮
  • ❯

System

  • With a Drink in Hand, Enjoy Sweet and Delightful Moments With the Cast
    • Bunny Garden is a social gathering place brimming with relaxation and excitement for gentlemen. Savor an extensive selection of drinks and snacks while enjoying conversation with the uniquely charming cast.
    • Ordering menu items tailored to a cast member’s preferences might just boost your likability?
    • Furthermore, as the drinks flow and they become tipsy, they might reveal sides of themselves you’ve never seen before.
  • Allow Your Favorite Girl’s Song to Intoxicate Your Heart
    • Each cast member has their own signature song. You might find yourself captivated by that lively girl’s energetic performance!
    • Plus, when they sing while tipsy, you might just catch a glimpse of a surprising side you’ve never seen before…
    • Laugh, feel your heart flutter, and get a little excited. Come see the cast’s stage performances with your own eyes.

Characters

  • Kana (voiced by Mio Hoshitani) – With her carefree smile, she treats everyone equally. She is like Bunny Garden’s own sun. Her brightness and kindness unwittingly melt customers’ hearts. Yet behind that smile lies a strong resolve to pursue a certain dream.
  • Rin (voiced by Eri Suzuki) – The life of the party at Bunny Garden. Free-spirited and friendly, she talks casually with first-time customers to close the distance. Sometimes she teases like a little devil, enjoying the reactions—leaving many people flustered. But behind that free-spiritedness lies a slightly unexpected side…
  • Miuka (voiced by Masumi Tazawa) – The sharp-tongued one at Bunny Garden, who speaks her mind without hesitation. Countless customers have been stung by her piercing words. Yet there’s no malice whatsoever. Rather, her frankness and unwavering stance possess a strange charm that somehow becomes addictive.
  • Erisa (voiced by Yukina Shuto) – A cast member on her trial period. She tends to act aloof, but is actually a very kind and considerate girl with a tsundere personality. She has a severe tendency to overthink things, where even the protagonist’s casual words or gestures can instantly send her imagination running wild in that direction. She may seem strong-willed, but she actually loves imagining romantic scenarios and sometimes gets lost in her own fantasy world.

Staff

  • Character Design: Waon Inui
  • Scenario: Takayoshi Muto (Synthese)
  • Producer: Yujiro Usuda

Watch the first footage below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Steam Trailer

Official Website Background Video



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/bunny-garden-2-debut-trailer-details-and-screenshots
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
